task_description: Run npx getdesign@latest add framer to install Framer design tokens, then apply the full Framer design system to the Ask OSAI page - poster-grade display type, dark canvas, white pill CTAs, gradient spotlight cards, and all DESIGN.md tokens.

verification.summary: npm run typecheck passes (exit 0), npm run build passes (exit 0, all 21 pages generated). No test suite exists in this project. No Dockerfile for the frontend. Review issues addressed in follow-up commit.
